title: 2-Pack Squeaky Dog Toys, Long Crinkle Tail with Treat Dispenser Pockets Plush Interactive Puzzle Toys for IQ Snuffle Foraging Training, Suitable for Small Medium & Large Dogs to Keep Them Busy
features: 【Double the Squeaky Crinkle Fun】Each squirrel & raccoon toy packs a surprise squeaker and a long, crinkle-filled tail for irresistible sounds that drive pups wild. This exciting combo keeps your dog happily entertained for hours, tiring them out and helping fight boredom or separation anxiety so you can enjoy some peace

【Turn Treat Time into a Brain Game】 Hide tasty treats inside the long tail’s 3 secret pockets and use the hook-and-loop closure to tie it up after rolling up the tail. Your pup will love sniffing, pawing, and untying the tail to uncover their rewards! This engaging puzzle satisfies their natural foraging instincts and provides crucial mental exercise, keeping them focused and happily occupied during meals or play

【Perfect Size for Tug-of-War】 At a generous 23 inches long, these plush toys give you plenty of room to grip safely while your dog tugs and shakes with excitement. The reinforced, elongated body is built to withstand playful pulls from small, medium, and even large breeds. Grab one end for an interactive play session that burns energy and strengthens your bond

【For Tough Play】We use denser, heavier fabric (420 GSM) and double-layered reinforcements with rugged stitching. This isn't just strong – rigorous testing confirms it handles up to twice the biting and pulling force before showing wear. Get lasting play for your money

【WARM TIPS】Our dog toys are rigorously tested for quality and safety. We recommend supervised play and timely replacement of broken ones. Toys cannot be eaten. If you have any concerns, please feel free to contact us
description: Product Description LECHONG 2-Pack Squeaky Dog Toy for IQ Snuffle Foraging Training No Fuss, Just Fun! - Play Instructions Loose the Dog Snuffle Toy Hide the Treats Roll Up and Stick Human-Friendly, Hound-Happy Tug of War Game Burns energy and strengthens your bond Dog Boredom Breaker 10 Mins Sniff Training = 1 Hour Walking Exercise Is this dog toy safe for dogs? All of our dog toys are made of safe, non-toxic and odorless materials. We firmly refuse to use recycled cotton, even if we have to pay a high cost for this. The safety of our dogs is our top priority. Can I return if my dog don't like it? Sure! We offer a 30-day free return policy so you don't have to worry! Just get it and have a try!
